quotes: The real question is not how much consciousness, if any, survives death but, rather, how much consciousness survives birth.
Consciousness: Source-saturated Self-awareness.
Each evolutionary shift creates both greater possibilities and greater temptations.
The three great drivers of evolution are Self-awareness, Freewill and Technology.
There is, currently, a dance-to-the-death between true evolution and the power grab of a cancerous cabal.

Plants live on photosynthesis – eating sunlight; Herbivores live by eating plants; Carnivores live by eating herbivores; Omnivores live by eating carnivores; Bacteria live by eating omnivores – even the ultimate omnivores: humans. It’s not a food pyramid, it’s a food cycle.
We humans are not the ‘king of the castle’, we are a section of a flowing stream whose destination is the ocean only to be recycled as a misty, mystical vapor to once more water the mountains.
Wisdom lives by demolishing ignorance; Love lives by overcoming fear.
The goal of evolution is to move from the densest, least-self-aware to the ultimate, subtlest fully-Self-Aware.
Compassion is the mystical art of leaving what is, in order to give birth to that which seeks to be.

The twin purposes of a community are to encourage its members to search and, simultaneously, challenge their beliefs; and this is meant to be a reciprocal arrangement; otherwise, you merely have individual robots in a community cult.

Those who are unconsciously evil are simply asleep; those who are unconsciously good are simply lucky; those who are consciously evil are pathological; and those who are consciously good are enlightened.
Something is true if it transforms me and aligns me with God; and something is Ultimate Truth if it transforms me radically and aligns me permanently with God.
Knowledge is information generated by the senses and processed by the brain; Wisdom is information generated by the soul and processed by the heart.
The purposes of mythology are to explain the present, remember or invent a glorious past, and inspire us to create an even better future.
To hear the Word of God, you must listen primarily with your heart, soul and imagination.
Fearful people are prepared to suffer the security of tyranny rather than the responsibilities of freedom.
If all my pasts and futures were collapsed into the now, the ego would be annihilated; so, the function of the brain is not to create consciousness but to filter it!
Each lifetime is a holographic fractal of the multi-incarnational journey of the soul.
Gaia is a womb in which radically different species are all living and evolving at different paces at ‘the same time.’ She is the mistress of parallel processing.
A problem is an invitation to Self-transcendence.
Time is an illusion of incarnation – like breaking up the food in a baby’s bowl for easy digestion.
Memory is not recalling the past, it’s realizing that there is only the present.
An enlightened mind/soul can instantaneously process all that is, now.
Time is not a measure of reality but a sign of the limitations of the processing intelligence.
Do you want to live in a society in which there are no human rights, only conditional permissions from the ruling tyrants?
There is a battle for the soul of the planet between Homo Sociopathicus and Homo Spiritualis.
My job as a spiritual director is not to poll the community members and then offer homilies that are bland pablum which neither offend nor inspire anybody.
Is Community about Affirmation or Challenge? Or both?
There is a subtle but very important difference between values and ideals.

Cultures of all kinds, whether they be religions, nations, or families, aver they are guided by ideals—the highest aspirations, such as love, peace, harmony, the Golden Rule—but their behavior frequently belies that assertion.
Mission: moving from Values to Ideals is a sine qua non for enlightenment.
Spiritual leaders who attempt to be a-political, soon become irrelevant because they can’t help those who have to live in the trenches created by the politics of everyday life.
The ministry of Jesus was to move manmade religions from legalism to love, from violence to forgiveness and from a punitive God to a gentle Abba.

When you identify with the physical body, then resurrections looks like a miracle, but when you identify with the soul, then resurrection is about reincarnation. And when you realize you are a holographic fractal of God, then the final resurrection is Union with Source.

Love is the womb of Light and Logos; Light is Christa Consciousness – the source of all matter; Logos is Christ Consciousness – the morphology that shapes all matter; Life is the dance of Christ Consciousness and Christa Consciousness; and Laughter is the awakening from the illusion of separation from Source.
There are two kinds of darkness – the welcoming womb that conceives all possible manifestations of love, and the turpid tomb that extinguishes all forms of love.
The forces of evil constantly attempt to turn love into hatred; light into oppressive darkness; logos (the Good News) into propaganda; life into death; and laughter into weeping.
Those souls who are awakening are undergoing a global Near Death Experience right now.
The Cosmos is a playground created by God to educate, entertain and evolve His children; it contains all kinds of theme parks, even some scary rides; Earth incarnation is among the scariest.

Whenever a huge majority gets lost in illusions and begins creating institutions (political, financial, religious, military…) that solidify the separation, God sends fully-enlightened avatars in the flesh to awaken us.

There are two kinds of darkness: (a) that which results in spiritual wisdom; and (b) that which results in spiritual dementia. Our world is in danger of descending into the latter, and our institutions seem hell-bent on accelerating us into this senility.
The only sin – personal, cultural, global – is to refuse to do the work needed to wake up.
Perfection is being committed is being committed to the mission; and happiness is being in alignment with the mission.
The Twin poles of learning are repetition and feedback; therefore “sin” properly harvested can be a feedback mechanism.
Culture is the personality of the community.
Until we reach enlightenment, the Sermon on the Mount must be sung again and again, as a mother sings a soothing lullaby to her fever-ridden infant. It is Christa comforting the Christ Child.
Life is simply a story; it is, at once, a single story and an infinite number of inter-woven timeless tales - personal, tribal, global and cosmic.
Separating spirituality from science, or theology from history, is an artificial exercise that attempts to tease apart the waft and woof of a single seamlessly-woven garment.

You can’t understand your own personal story unless you understand the story of your family and how it emerges from the story of your tribe, which depends on the story of our species and, ultimately, on the story of God. Because your story is a holographic fractal of God’s story.
Every story is a story of Pentecost – all of us are meant to be prophets who dream dreams and envision visions for our world and for our times.

When some future space-travelling grandparent is telling the story of planet Earth to the grandchildren, how will the story end? “And they all lived happily ever after …”? Every child wants it to end like that.
Prayer is a conversation initiated by the immanence of God, in dialogue with the transcendence of God.

Life is a dream that the ego is having; the ego is a dream that the soul is having; the soul is a dream that Spirit is having; and Spirit is a dream that Source is having. So, everything that exists in the phenomenal realms is simply…God in drag.

Inspirationally, Mary of Magdala wasn’t just a teacher, she was a source of extraordinary alignment for the other disciples. She was literally the Apostola Apostolorum. She was the Apostle to the Apostles.

I am Love, residing in the sacred heart of the Heavenly Father; I am Light residing in the sacred heart of Mother Mary; I am Logos, residing in the sacred heart of Jesus; I am Life, residing in the sacred heart of the Holy Spirit; and I am Laughter, residing in the sacred hearts of the awakened ones.

The role of a spiritual teacher is not to feed people inoffensive, pre-digested pablum but, rather, to stretch them out of their comfort zone into the realization and activation of their own inner divinity.
If you’ve never taken a position that triggered somebody, you’re seriously lacking in principles.
As you build inspiring ritual or teachings around an archetype, it doesn’t matter if its fictional or factual as long as its inspirational.
The archetype is the ideal mission implanted on the soul; the complex is the incarnated version of the mission; and this distinction parallels the split between ideals and values.
Power corrupts and its ultimate aim is to control resources, people and institutions - including politics, religion, news media, finance, agriculture, medicine, armies and education.
Narcissistic megalomaniacs tend to rise and self-promote to leadership positions in all kinds of governing bodies and hierarchical systems.
Whoever Satan is, we are meant to work with that reality in order to grow spiritually.
Temptation is not just an invitation to evil but an opportunity to hone the faculty of discernment.
Can’t hit bull’s eye unless you use the feedback of previous arrows to adjust your aim Without temptation we would be robots, pre-programmed to be “good.”

Meaning’ is the aha! when we harvest our experiences for evidence of how well or badly we are aligned with our mission; but there are true meanings and false meanings – meaning is in the mind of the seeker; true meaning matches the complex to the archetype.

A single bulb can dispel a roomful of darkness – the opposite is not true; a battery of bulbs can dispel a warehouse full of darkness – the opposite is not true. The greatest weapon of the dark forces is to persuade/threaten the masses to turn off or hide their lights. Don’t hide your light under a bushel measure.

There are three kinds of ‘divine intervention’ - 1) Activating the god within ourselves; 2) Imploring assistance from the god within more enlightened beings (e.g., angels, ET’s…); and 3) Direct intervention by Source Itself.

ET’s only step in when the fabric of spacetime is in danger (e.g., July 1945 – Trinity) God or angels only step in when the soul itself is in danger; otherwise they all follow the prime directive because we are here to learn and grow via karma.

A problem is an invitation to self-transcendence; if all you do is solve the problem, life will simply give you another one. Elevate your consciousness and then you will see far more elegant solutions.
The four key questions as you begin to formulate your Personal Cosmology are: 1) Who is God? 2) Who am I? 3) Who is my neighbor? and 4) What is my mission?
Karma is life’s lesson plan; Fate is where it should lead us – if we follow it; and Destiny is where it will lead us – if we don’t follow it.

Life is improv theater; there is neither plot nor script – otherwise we wouldn’t learn; and the two rules of improv theater are: 1) you must work with whatever the other actors say or do; and 2) your job is to feed the other actors lines that make them look good.
Ideals are how you’d like to behave; Values are how you’re likely to behave.

The role of the prophet is not to predict the future but to prevent it; not to foretell the future but to forestall it; because the task of the prophet it to call the community back into the soul’s covenant with Source.
Race car drivers say ‘where your eyes go, your car will follow’ – so, where your mind goes, your life will follow.

Great shifts occur whenever a single soul transcends to a higher dimension; greater shifts occur whenever a species transcends to a higher dimension Heaven is an infinite and exciting journey, not a destination or reward for being ‘good’; ‘Mbinguni si mahali bali ni hali’ (Swahili) = ‘heaven is not a place, it is a state of consciousness.’ The Akashic records are an infinite series of organically-evolving clusters generated by the experiences of beings at every level of reality, in and out of ‘time.’ And the Morphogenetic Field is the species-specific subset of the Akashic records.
As you prepare to incarnate, Grandmother God, whispers your secret, sacred name – it is the Logos, and it morphs your soul into your mission.

Great shifts occur whenever a single soul transcends to a higher dimension; greater shifts occur whenever a species transcends to a higher dimension The Akashic records are an infinite series of organically evolving clusters generated by the experiences of beings at every level of reality, in and out of ‘time.’ And the Morphogenetic Field is the species-specific subset of the Akashic records.

ET’s only step in when the fabric of spacetime is in danger (e.g., July 1945 – Trinity) God or angels only step in when the soul itself is in danger; otherwise, they all follow the prime directive because we are here to learn and grow via karma.

Heaven is an infinite and exciting journey, not a destination or reward for being ‘good’; ‘Mbinguni si mahali bali ni hali’ (Swahili) = ‘heaven is not a place, it is a state of consciousness.’ The Akashic records are an infinite series of organically evolving clusters generated by the experiences of beings at every level of reality, in and out of ‘time.’ And the Morphogenetic Field is the species-specific subset of the Akashic records.

Blessing is not the imparting of benediction to a previously profane substance but, rather, the recognition of the inherent divinity of all that is. Everything that exists is a Word-of-God-made-flesh.

In Jesus’ parable of the weeds sown among the wheat, the good seed is the God archetype, the weeds are the distractions that create the complex, and the harvest is the life review that will prepare us for our next incarnation. The life review has nothing to do with a ‘final judgment’ or with the notion of ‘hell’.
Those who never forgive an enemy, do not understand themselves; and those who never forgive themselves, do not understand God.
Anyone who has never made an enemy, has never done anything original; and anyone who has never made a mistake, has never done anything creative.

Separating spirituality from science, or theology from history is an artificial exercise that attempts to tease apart the waft and woof of a single seamlessly-woven garment When I worked in Kenya, the three principles on which I tried to build spiritual communities were: kujitegemea (self-reliance), kujitumikia (self-ministering), and kujieneza (self-propagating).

Like us humans, Gaia also has seven levels of ‘body’ 1. The Physio-sphere (studied by physics/chemistry) 2. The Atmo-sphere (the womb of life, studied by climatology). 3. The Bio-sphere (the fruit of that womb, studied by biology). 4. The Noo-sphere (the global brain studied by psychology). 5. The Anima-sphere (or soul of the planet studied by theology). 6. The Pneuma-sphere (The Spirit of God studied by mysticism). And 7. The Brahma-sphere (Union with Source which can’t be studied but can be experienced.) Humans are currently gingerly making our way through the ‘asteroid belt’ between Noosphere and Animasphere.
Does God have a sense of humor or what? The Bible only mentions cats twice, dogs 40 times but donkeys 444 times. Is there a hidden message here?

The Transfiguration of Jesus was a dress rehearsal for his subsequent Resurrection. It was a kind of life review in which he scanned not just his own life but the life of his religious tradition – a meeting with Moses (archetype of the liberator) and Elijah (archetype of the prophets.) The Agony of Jesus in the Garden of Gethsemane was the mother of all panic attacks. It was a psyops by Satan on the eve of the Crucifixion, not just to shatter Jesus’ belief in his own mission but in the Word of God itself.
Nature dances between Occam’s Razor and Michelangelo’s Chisel; solving its problems with elegant parsimony whilst bedecking herself with flamboyant artistry.

A poor idea is one that neither upsets nor inspires anyone; a good idea is one that upsets some while inspiring others; a great idea is one that, initially, upsets everybody but eventually inspires them all.

The mission of the light bringers is: Taking education away from the child molesters; Taking economics away from the banksters; Taking healing away from big pharma; Taking storytelling away from the mass media; Taking entertainment away from Hollywood; Taking food production away from agribusiness; Taking fire away from the military-industrial complex; Taking democracy away from the politicians; and Taking spirituality away from Mecca and Rome.

Some important distinctions: Empathy says, “I’m gonna do it for you.” Sympathy says, “I’m gonna do it with you.” And Compassion says, “I’m gonna hold the space for you to do it yourself.” Life is like a jigsaw puzzle. When you open the box (become self-aware) all the pieces you’ll need are present, and all the pieces present are needed. It’s up to you to assemble them. If there are holes or unused pieces when you die, you’ll choose to reincarnate and try again.
Evil is not by God’s design but by human default. Evil is an emergent phenomenon. It’s not preprogrammed into life’s blueprint but, rather, arises from misreading the instructions.
Without spirituality, life is just a freezer in which we strive to keep the meat of incarnation from spoiling.
The mass media are primarily devices so that the global garbage from the world’s septic system can back up and overflow into your sitting room and psyche.

By ‘mythish’ I mean a sacred form of language, which fundamentalism reduces to literalism and scientism regards as gibberish. Only parables, proverbs and stories understand mythish. It is the mystical tongue in which true wisdom is archived and transmitted from soul to soul.

Vocalizations are the language of animals; Words are the language of humans; Rituals are the language of communities, and silence is the language of mystics Uni-Verse-Ability: the soul’s talent for experiencing parallel lives and simultaneous incarnations.
Quantum Entanglement is simply God hugging all of Her children and hoping they can all get along with each other.

Sacraments ‘happen’ when the liturgical symbols lead to an Altered State of Consciousness that empower us to go trans-personal, trans-temporal, trans-spatial and trans-rational – thus allowing us to select out any reality by our attention and intention.
Narcissism and Enlightenment are at opposite ends of the spiritual spectrum.

The present moment is the logical, consistent outcome of all the choices made by all the players who’ve arrived on stage since the Big Bang. And the future will be the logical, consistent outcome of how we all ‘play’ out parts until we reach the Big Reunion. The journey between the beginning and the end is a very complex one. Keep your soul awake.

We are as much products of our future as we are of our past. That’s what ‘Perfection’ (from the Greek, ‘Telos’) means: to be utterly committed to the purpose for which we incarnated. It is our GPS (God-Perceiving System).
The cosmos is multilingual using not just the senses and the brain but, primarily, the heart and the soul to communicate.

“Junk DNA” is simply mathematical information awaiting a suitable environment in order to manifest in physical form Carl Jung said that Archetypes are symbols of the Collective Unconscious of the species. I believe that there are Super-Archetypes which are symbols of the Collective Unconscious of the Cosmos itself.

When Love encounters Fear, it gives birth to compassion for the little, fragile, separate self. When Fear encounters Love, it gives birth to existential dread because it intuits its own inevitable dissolution into Source.

Where languages shine: Latin is the language for theology; Italian is the language for music; Spanish is the language for poetry; German is the language for philosophy; English is the language for engineering; Sanskrit is the language for mysticism; and Gaelic is the language for storytelling.

The journey from slavery to freedom takes several generations of self-less, compassionate Awakened Ones; but the journey from freedom to slavery only takes a single generation of selfish, I’m-a-victim Woke Ones.
Fundamentalism is how religion shoots itself in the soul, and how scientism shoots itself in the head, leaving the world with a God-shaped hole in the human psyche.

Fundamentalist science gives us a cosmos without God, a cosmos without purpose and, as a bonus, weapons of mass destruction and ecological devastation. Fundamentalist religion gives us a God without love, a theology without compassion and, as a bonus, hell for all eternity for the nonbelievers.

In human relationships, the two greatest adaptogens are fear and love. They’ve never met a container to which they cannot conform nor a situation they are not able to conquer. So, what is your greatest strength, or your ultimate defense mechanism: your ability to hate those who love you or your ability to love those who hate you?

Jesus chose to speak only in parables (rather than in theological, philosophical, or scientific language) precisely because he did not want his message to be a one-size-fits-all-people-in-all-eras, but rather as Socratic seeds to be weeded and watered in the pristine garden of the human soul.

Heaven is not a reward for being a rule keeper. It’s the experience, even here and now, of a mindset utterly given over to love and compassion. Heaven, he said, is ‘en mesoi’ (meaning ‘within you’ and ‘among you’.) We experience it within us by aligning with love and we experience it among us by acting in love.
Only love is real – everything else you encounter is either an experience of love or a reaction to love.
Love is infinitely patient and will wait out countless incarnations, and eons of Earth time, until her children – individually and as a species – melt their egos and return to their Soul-selves.

If I awaken, at any stage of incarnation, I will immediately recognize that only God exists. I will smile and offer Namasté to everything that I encounter, from a wave breaking on the beach, to an acorn full of the promise of growing up to become an oak tree, to the wrinkled old lady in the back seat of the church gripping her rosary beads. Everything that exists is simply God-in-drag.
The grace of God, like sunlight, is ever present, but the moody clouds of our inner darkness and the outer umbrellas of our discordant behavior interfere with its healing effects.
There is actually no such thing as a ‘half-hearted’ gesture. The heart cannot divide up its love output.
Only the ego can measure out micro-doses of compassion or titrate forgiveness in milliliters.

Nobody is in your life by accident or coincidence, but rather by design. It is a mutual agreement. That is the whole meaning of karma: the hand you were dealt at birth is exactly the hand you planned as you signed up for an Earth experience. And all of the players – the good, the bad and the ugly – were interviewed and vetted for their contributions to your life’s lessons. So, suit up and “Take two!”
Just as all wars are civil wars and all violence is an autoimmune reaction, so too, all forgiveness is really self-forgiveness.

The greatest toxins on the planet are not oil spills, chemtrails, fossil fuels or garbage dumping but, rather, anger, fear, anxiety, xenophobia, and revenge. While the former clog the physical arteries of the planet, the latter clog the etheric and astral arteries of Gaia. The most effective form of chelation is forgiveness.

Our heroes have to be people who’ve harvested all life situations for love. If they haven’t been ‘in the trenches’, they can’t be real models for us. It’s why the vast bulk of ‘celebrities’ can never inspire us spiritually, because they only shine when they are being worshipped. Thus, a plastic hermaphroditic Jesus pretending to be human, is useless.
Using fear, fundamentalism has made life a living hell for believers, and the afterlife an eternal hell for the non-believers.
The last 24 hours of Jesus’ life were a demonstration of how to die, but the previous 30 years were a demonstration of how to live. And his entire incarnation was a demonstration of how to love.
The Cross, properly understood, is how we find the ‘thin places’ and pierce the veil of Maya.

If little green leaves, fluttering in the breeze, are siblings, then the twigs from which they emerge, must be the parents, while the branches supporting those twigs are the grandparents, who come from the lordly limbs – the great-grandparents, themselves progeny of the mighty trunk – the great-great-grandparents, the visible offspring of the exploring root system – the great-great-great-grandparents. Is it any wonder that we speak of the ‘family tree’, ‘etz chaim’, ‘the tree of life’, ‘the axis mundi’…?

Religion stagnates when fear and craven obedience become the basis of its relationship with God; law and dogma the basis of its relationship with its own members; and prejudice and xenophobia the basis of its relationship with the “others.”
The temptation of religion is to jam the gear stick of the mass transit vehicle into neutral, glide to a halt and huddle safely in the bus. The insight of mysticism is to get out and walk.

Just as we can breed plants and animals in order to either extinguish or amplify particular traits, cultures are petri dishes in which vices and virtues can be bred in or bred out. When you carefully study history, you can see that particular families or cultures or nations or religions have been groomed to extinguish virtues that are seen as weaknesses (compassion, patience, forgiveness, etc.) and to accentuate vices that confer power (anger, revenge, fraud, etc.).

The soothing mantra of the Beatitudes, when sung into the deafening cacophony of tribal violence, will in time, dissolve all dissonance and lead to a cosmic symphony of love sound. Then, truly, we will see that we live in a Universe.

The laughter of little children allows them to surf their imagination on the waves of the ocean of God’s own laughter. Alas, “life” and school soon suppress this in favor of the inculcation of factoids.

Laughter at its core comes from the deepest wisdom, the innermost conviction that only God exists and only love is real. Armed with that knowledge, you can strap yourself into the roller-coaster of life and enjoy the ride, even as your stomach does somersaults and your companions scream in delighted terror.
A hug is physicalized laughter—a life raft thrown to a swimmer floundering in the choppy waters of incarnation.
Laughter is the difference between fanaticism and commitment. Any God at whom or with whom I cannot laugh is far too small a God for me.

In deep meditation we will notice that the ever-patient ocean of God’s immanence has washed clean the pock-marked beach of yesterday’s feverish foot traffic, so that we may imprint new hieroglyphics—cosmically inspired sacred writings—on the newly-rearranged sands of an awakened lifetime.

Evolution involves moving from freewill (the ability to do as I please) to freedom (the ability to do as pleases God); to move from a preoccupation with service-to-self into a commitment to service-to-other; to move from narcissism to compassion; to go from an isolating sense-of-separate-self into unity consciousness; to go from crippling fear to unconditional love; and to move from mere knowledge to wisdom.

The journey from gods, to God, to Source is a long, arduous one. It starts with the amnesia of incarnation, and wanders through the labyrinthine illusions of ego, until it finally finds itself on the pathless mystery of the soul, on the verge of merging.

Imagination is the single most important faculty of mystics and scientists alike. The ability to imagine is the difference between a creative genius and a plodding technician, between invention and merely manufacturing the imagined device.

The churches of the world would be well advised to listen to the promptings of “the little people in the pews.” Participatory storytelling is much more likely to lead to spiritual evolution than a crozier-wielding oligarchy imposing the “one, true, catholic and apostolic truth” on the unwashed masses. The meme-making of the future must be the outcome of all of the voices adding to the storyline.

What if the senses are not really reducers, but enhancers? What if the senses are the most basic form of imagination, with the extraordinary ability to transform the dull series of science’s 0’s and 1’s into the image of a daffodil or the sound of children laughing? What if the myth of the given is a PlayStation devised by God to turn boring electromagnetic data into sensual symphonies of sound and awe-inspiring visions of a sunset?

What if the “imagination of the sensorium” is the first stage of restoration, reconstructing the miracles of music and the wonder of a waterfall, from the dull, gray, repetitive sequence of mere numbers? And what if pure love, in all its many manifestations—compassion, courage, forgiveness, patience—is the final transformer, resurrecting the separated souls into the bliss of full awareness and unity consciousness?
It’s more important to paddle one’s own canoe in the river of Spirit than be an obedient, unthinking rower in “the barque of Peter” (or Mohammed, Moses, etc.)

Mysticists live where real science meets true spirituality. Their mission is to identify the love impulse in the soul of humanity, the glowing embers which the avatars of all traditions have secretly tended and blow upon them so that they burst into the purifying flames of unconditional love for all sentient beings.
Unless your belief system gets triggered occasionally, you are destined to sleep your way through life in a soporific stupor, guided by a jaded, inherited, secondhand cosmology.
When your soul volunteered to incarnate at this period of human history, were you naïve, masochistic or compassionate? In any case, now would be a really good time to fully awaken to your mission.

There is a huge difference between Sin and Evil. Sin is the individual transgression of a culturally created law; whereas Evil is a cosmic conspiracy, using human intermediaries, to separate souls from Source.
A major focus of Evil, in our times, is the sexualization of our children; It is Herod’s ‘Slaughter of the Innocents’ for the 21st century.

The mind is a ‘special needs’ child, who finds it difficult to understand cosmic messages. The soul is multilingual and delights in parallel processing, which is cacophony to the intellect but symphony to the spirit. Time out!
Freewill is simply a waystation on the spectrum that joins attachment/addiction to non-attachment/freedom.

The Holy Spirit is the divine womb in which embryonic Christ Consciousness is bathed in the amniotic fluid of Pure Love. And incarnation is the willing dive into forgetting, so that the experience of separation may lead to the nostalgic longing for Home, and the re-discovery of our Buddha nature.
Somebody who is afraid to upset anybody is destined to remain a nobody.
We must learn to distinguish the MINDFIELD (Noosphere) from the MINEFIELD (Transhumanism) lest we confuse Enlightenment with Servitude, and the Awakened Ones with the Robots.

Is the Magic Wand of mythology actually a shape-shifting, consciousness-transforming technology of ancient, more advanced civilizations? And is all mystical ritual – plant medicine, Eucharist, meditation … an effort to attain that gift?
Turning your humble home into a Thin Place where Spirit parts the veil in order to flood the secular with the sacred, and breathes the mystical into the merely mundane.

Turning boring routines into the liturgy of daily sacraments: your morning ablutions into a baptism; your breakfast into a Eucharistic meal; your conversations into reconciliation; you’re your commitments into confirmation; your relationships into the marriage of soul and spacesuit; your morning awakening into an ordination rite for your Earth ministry; and your aches and pains into an anointing of the sick.
Boredom becomes a breakthrough into the mystical mindfulness of your mission
Dawn becomes a daily monastic bell inviting you into a renewal of your Earth vows when you enthusiastically shouted, “Here I am Lord, send me!”
It is the love-driven natural instinct of a mother who sees the breast-feeding of her baby and the changing of its dirty diapers nor as chores but as the privilege of embracing a Christ newly born
It is activating the Michelangelo inside you to chip away the marble manacles of routine in order to release a David or, perhaps, a Pieta
Even reincarnation is the enthusiastic plea of the play-addicted child who pleads with the parent, “Again! Again!!”
The Akashic Records are journals of God’s forays into Spacetime: the universe is Her descent into physicality and the cosmic cycles are the interface between timelessness and temporality.
There is no place that God cannot be born, and there is no time when God cannot incarnate, so, midwife your life and thus usher divinity into your day.

When we learn to turn the daily drag into the liturgy of life, then routine becomes a portal, a thin place, a Caol Áit, a sacrament that creates a symphony in which each inbreath is an octave of sunrise and each outbreath an octave of sunset.
Each pulsebeat is a fractal of the moon-driven waves washing the beach clean from yesterday’s people-trodden, feverish foot traffic. This is your own personal ‘liturgy of the hours.’
The shadow side of science and technology is that they sacrifice mystical meaning on the altar of a secular utilitarianism.
We have outsourced the siddhis to soul-less technologies and lost our innate abilities in the process.

Transhumanism uses the carrot of prosthetic siddhis while hiding the stick of total loss of freedom and separation from Source. It is the pedophile seducing the innocent schoolchild into his car with the offer of candy.

Bureaucracy: the languid, lugubrious process whereby unelected bean-counters turn human creativity into global lethargy; it involves banning the reading of literary classics while promoting the study of phone books.
I believe that the Nazarene’s message from ‘beyond the veil’ would be: “What I want is imitation not adoration, Christ Consciousness not Jesus worship.”
The ego is the politician of the psyche, always on the lookout for an existing promising-looking enterprise to hijack and claim authorship of.
Genuine, loving laughter-at-oneself is the first sign of enlightenment; genuine, loving laughter-at-the-world is the first sign of compassion.

A Vision of the Pieta Before I went to sleep on October 16, 2025, I had been thinking about the Pieta which Michelangelo carved in 1499. That night I had a dream about it, and when I woke up on October 17, I wrote the following essay about my dream.

As Mary held the bloody, thorn-pricked body of her crucified son, she had a flashback to the time when she cradled the little, bloodied body of her newly born infant as she cradled him at her nurturing breast.
The Pieta is not just a frozen image of a dead Christ but, rather, it is the entire history of the human species telescoped into a moment of time.

A telepathic conversation took place between them. They both intoned, “It is completed; mission accomplished.” In her heart she still hears the phrase, “Mother, behold your son” because each of us is a precious child of God – a holographic fractal of Source. And she also hears the phrase, “Son, behold your mother” because each one of us volunteered to be a mother of God, birthing Transcendence into incarnation.
